titleStmt.title: SII 17.607: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 607. (A.R. No. 562 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the second prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.
This epigraph commences with the praśasti Pūmālai miḍaindu of Vikramachōḷa. His surname, Rājakēsari, given here, is probably a mistake for Parakēsari.

It records the sale of land made tax-free by the sabhā of Vāyaṟṟūr, a brahmadēya in Tiruvārūr-kūṟṟam in Gēyamāṇikka-vaḷanāḍu receiving 26(1/2) kāśu out of the amount endowed to the temple by Arāvaṇai Pandakkūttaṉ Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa Amattiyarāyan, a member of the regiment called Tyāgavalli Vēḷaikkāṟar. A Tyāgavinōdan-śālai maḍam is also mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmālai miṭai ntu ponmālai nikaḻtarapThis inscription is very indifferently engraved.pāmālai malinta parumaṇit tiraḷ puyat tirunilamaṭantaiyoṭu jeyamakaḷiruppak kaṉavarai mārvan taṉateṉap peṟṟut tirumakaḷorutaniyiruppak kalaimakaḷ coṟṟiṟam puṇarnta kaṟpiṉaḷāki viruppoṭu nāvakattiruppa Akila puvaṉamuṅ kalippatorputumatipol veṇkuṭaimicai niṟpak karuṅkaliyoḷittu vaṉpilattiṭaikkiṭappak kuḷattiṭaitteliṅka viman vilaṅkalmicai yeṟavum kaliṅkapumiyaik kaṉaleri parukavum Ai(y)mpaṭaipparuvattu vempaṭaitāṅki veṅkai maṇṭalat tāṅkinitiruntacaippap paṭuttaruḷitteṉṟicait tarumamuntavamun tāṉamun taḻaippa vetamu talaittalai
vāṇai pārttivar cūṭa niṟaimaṇi makuṭa muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭi maṉnuyiṟkellā miṉnuyirttāyWritten below the line. pol taṇṇaḷi parappit tanittani parantu maṇmuḻutaḷittu maṉunetivaḷar(t*)tut taṉ koyil koṟṟa vācaṟpuṟattu maṇi nāvoṭuṅka muracukaḷ muḻaṅka vicaiyamum(ka) pukaḻu meṉmeloṅkac ceḻiyar veñcurampu ka ceralar kaṭalpuka Aḻitaruciṅkaḷa(r)rañci niṉcalamara cciṅkar tiṟaiyiṭakkannaṭar venniṭak koṅka rotuṅkak koṅkaṇar cāya maṟṟetticaimaṉnaru n=taṉtamakkaraṇeṉat tirumalaṟcevaṭi Urimaiyiṟañcit tollai Eḻulakun toḻuteḻat toṉṟiya mullaivāṇakai mukkokkiḻānaṭi Umaiyoṭu caṅkaraṉ Imaiyaccilaic p porunti yuṭaniruppa Ā va makiḻa ka p pākiyateriva tilata
maṭappaṭi punitakuṇa(a) vanitai tiripuvaṉa muḻutuṭaiyā ḷivan tiruvuḷḷattaruḷ muḻu tuṭaiyāḷeṉna viruppac cempoṉ virasiṅhāsanattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakeśaripanmarāṉa cakkaravattikaḷ śrī vikkiramacoḻadevaṟku Iyāṇṭu 3 Āvatu keyamāṇikka vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvārur kūṟṟattubrahmadeyam vāyaṟṟūr sabhaikku camain=ta pārattuvāci tiruvaraṅkan paṟpanāpapaṭṭaṉum pārattuvāci caṇṭecuvaraṉ śrī kiṣṇapaṭṭaṉum pārattuvāci Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷan caṇṭecuvaraṉum pārattuvāci perumpuṟ kūṭal teṟpākaṉum pārattuvāci perumpuṟakūṭal cirāmatevaṉum pārattuvāci taWritten below the line.ṇ ṭecuvaraṉ perumpuṟakkaṭal rimā ṭaka m Uḷḷiṭṭa sabhaiyom nila vilai ḷakāṭa 1000 muṭṭa
lil Āti taṇṭecuvara tevar pakkal Ittiruvārur ttiyaāk(ā)valli veḷaikāṟaril Arāvaṇai pantakkūttaṉāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻa Amattiyarāyan Amāvāci puṭakaikku Oṭukkivaitta kāci 73kku Ūcikaikku Uṭalillāmaiyil ṅkaḷ koḷkaikku nāṅkaḷ poṉkoṇṭu poliyuṭṭāka Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta paricāvatu nāṅkaḷ Amāvācippuṟamāka Uṇkaikku Ivvuḷḷūrbrāhmaṇar pattukkalamum Apurvikaḷ [ patta] brāhmaṇar pattukalamum Ākak kalam Irupatum Uṇkaikku Uḷḷur Iṟaiyili nilamum piramāṇañceytu kuṭutta paricāvatu Ivvūrp poṉkoṇṭu poliyūṭṭāka Iṟaiyilaṭṭukiṟa tiyākavinotaṉ cālai maṭattukku kiḻpāṟkellai teruvukku meṟku teṉpāṟkellai teruvukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai peruntirukkoyil mātevar nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellaikoyi teṟku[ m Āka Ivvicain=ta] peru nāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa kuḻi[4 10] Ikkuḻi ṟ ña nilavā
pakkal nilam ṉālumā Iṉnilaṉālumāvukku kkiḻpāṟkellai pārattuvāci perum puṟakkaṭal cirāmatevan nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai nāṭṭār vāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpaāṟkellai pārattuvāci Amuta ṭacuvara nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai peruvaḻi teṟkum Āka Iṉ nāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa kuḻi 100ṉāl nilañ3 māvu Ittiyākavinotaṉcālaikku Irupattu mā[�]m Inta Ātitaṇṭecuvara tevaṟku viṟṟu Iṟaiyiliceytu kuṭutta nilattu nāṅkaḷ koḷvatāṉa Emmi licainta vilaipporu ḷaṉṟāṭu naṟkācu māttāl kācu �kavu kācu Āṟaraiyum cālai kuḻi nāṟpatukku kkācu Iraṇṭum Ākakkācu 2 10 6� Ikkācu Irupattāṟarai Āvaṇakkaḷiye kāṭṭeṟṟik kaiccela Aṟakkoṇṭu Iṉnilaṉālumāvum Iccālaikkuḻi nāṟpatum viṟṟukkuṭuttuiṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttom Ivvāticaṇṭecuvaratevar(tevar)kku Iccuṭṭappaṭṭa mahāsa[ bheyom] I
Irupattāṟaraiyumey vilaiyāvatākavum Ituvey vilai ṇṇavatākavum Ituvey poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭcelavolai yāvatākavu mitallatu veṟuporuḷ māvaṟutipporuṭ celavolai kāṭṭakkaṭavarallātaārākavum Iṉnilattukku muṉṟa ṭiyum koṟṟavāyalāṭakkaṭavutākavum vāram Iṉnilakkāl [van=ta] veṭṭi vetiṉai Eṟcoṟkkūṟṟarici velikkācu tulaitta tiruvācalip ponta kuṭimai yellām nāṅkaḷe ce vomākavum Inilat kkalliluñ cempilum veṭṭik koḷḷap peṟuvārākavuṅ Uḷḷur p(o)runtirukkoyilil mātevar koyilil Iṟaiyiliyākac ceytapaṭi Ūttāyamum Iṟukkakkaṭa vāṉākavum Iccālai maṉaikuḻi nāṟpatukkum Innilamuṉṟu māvināl kuḻiṉā nūṟṟukkum Ivanukkum Ivan vaṟkattāṟkum kuṭi nikkāta tevataāṉamāy niṉṟu śantirātittavaṟ māka varucantoṟum Ūṭṭakkaṭava Ikkācu Irupattāṟaraiyu
m koṇṭu Iṉnila ṉālumāvum Ikkuḻi nāṟpatum vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak koṇṭu Orukālāvatum Irukālā(tu)vatu mukkālāvatu vilaikkaṟaviṟṟup poruḷaṟakkoṇṭu cantirātittavaṟ(vaṟ) sāśvatikamāka Iṟaiyiliceytu kuṭut tom Āticaṇṭecuvaratevaṟku pārattuvāci tiruvara perum puṟakkaṭalteṟpākaṉum vā � Aṭaiyum �raṉte rāyu karuḷ riram pacaṇa na ka kaIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.607 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
